## Week in Review: 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-19

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 5.9.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 1.9 (+8.3% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.04)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.9 (+85.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.27)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.0 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.43)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 5.9 (+17.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
